data.title: Grant Cardone's Tax Strategies May Hurt You More Than Help, Says Financial Expert
Taylor Swift's Record-Breaking Eras Tour Wraps: A Look At The Numbers
data.description: Taylor Swift's record-breaking Eras Tour came to an end Sunday night with its final show in Vancouver, Canada. Here's a look back at the most profitable concert tour in history.

data.title: AbbVie's Early Parkinson's Candidate Hits Primary Goal In Pivotal Late-Stage Study
data.description: AbbVie reports Phase 3 TEMPO-2 trial success for tavapadon, a once-daily Parkinson's treatment, showing significant symptom improvement and safety.

data.title: Equinor Wraps Up $2 Billion Asset Sale, Streamlining Global Oil And Gas Portfolio
data.description: Equinor exits Azerbaijan and Nigeria, realizing up to $2 billion and aligning with their strategy to optimize their portfolio and sustain production.

data.title: Peter Schiff: Bitcoin Is A Threat To The US And 'Public Enemy Number One'
data.description: Renowned Bitcoin critic  Peter Schiff has labelled Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) as a greater threat to the U.S.
